info.title: LedgerLens
info.description:
LedgerLens REST API — real-time risk scoring, manipulation detection, and governance for the Stellar DEX.  Serves RiskScore records produced by the detection pipeline and exposes admin/compliance tools for exchange operators.

## Authentication
- **Admin endpoints** require ``X-LedgerLens-Admin-Key`` header.
- **Compliance endpoints** require ``X-LedgerLens-Compliance-Key`` header.
- **Scoped API keys** (``X-LedgerLens-Api-Key``) support ``read:scores``, ``write:suppressions``, and ``admin`` scopes with per-key rate limits.

get.description:
Return combined analyst view for ``wallet``.

Response sections:
1. current_score      — latest RiskScore record
2. shap_top_10        — top-10 SHAP feature contributions
3. trade_timeline     — last 30 days of scoring events
4. ring_membership    — wash-trading rings containing this wallet
5. score_trend        — historical score values (last 30 days)
6. open_alerts        — typed manipulation alerts for this wallet

parameters.name: asset_pair

schema.description: Asset pair to focus on (optional; defaults to highest-scored pair)
schema.title: Asset Pair

parameters.description: Asset pair to focus on (optional; defaults to highest-scored pair)

schema.title: Response Analyst Wallet View Analyst Wallet  Wallet  Get

post.description:
Capture analyst verdict for ``wallet``.

The verdict is stored in ``analyst_feedback`` and is available to the
active learning loop via ``GET /analyst/feedback?since=<ISO_TIMESTAMP>``.

Accepted verdicts: ``confirmed_wash``, ``false_positive``, ``needs_review``.

schema.title: Response Submit Feedback Analyst Wallet  Wallet  Feedback Post

get.description:
Return the top ``limit`` wallets awaiting analyst review, sorted by score desc.

A wallet is "awaiting review" when it has a risk score >= threshold and
has not been reviewed today.

schema.title: Response Analyst Queue Analyst Queue Get

get.description:
Return aggregate analyst review statistics.

Response fields:
- cases_reviewed_today: int
- false_positive_rate_30d: float (0.0–1.0)
- avg_review_time_seconds: float | None

schema.title: Response Analyst Stats Analyst Stats Get

get.description:
Export analyst feedback records for the active learning loop (Issue #052).

Consumed by the retraining pipeline to ingest human labels.  Returns all
feedback submitted on or after ``since`` in ascending chronological order.

Example: ``GET /analyst/feedback?since=2026-06-01T00:00:00Z``

parameters.name: since

schema.description: ISO-8601 timestamp; returns all feedback submitted at or after this time
schema.title: Since

parameters.description: ISO-8601 timestamp; returns all feedback submitted at or after this time

schema.title: Response Analyst Feedback Export Analyst Feedback Get

post.summary: Add a wallet to the allowlist
post.description: Marks a wallet as trusted.  Overrides the computed risk score to 0 with ``override: 'allowlisted'`` on ``GET /v1/scores/{wallet}``. Requires ``X-LedgerLens-Admin-Key`` header.

schema.title: Response Add To Allowlist Admin Allowlist Post

get.description: Returns active allowlist entries with pagination.  Pass ``include_removed=true`` to include soft-deleted entries in the audit trail.

schema.title: Response List Allowlist Admin Allowlist Get

delete.summary: Remove a wallet from the allowlist
delete.description: Soft-deletes the active allowlist entry for ``wallet``.  The removal is recorded in the audit trail with ``removed_at`` timestamp. Returns 404 if the wallet has no active allowlist entry.

schema.title: Response Remove From Allowlist Admin Allowlist  Wallet  Delete

post.summary: Add a wallet to the denylist
post.description: Marks a wallet as a confirmed bad actor.  Overrides the computed risk score to 100 with ``override: 'denylisted'`` on ``GET /v1/scores/{wallet}``. Requires ``X-LedgerLens-Admin-Key`` header.

schema.title: Response Add To Denylist Admin Denylist Post

get.description: Returns active denylist entries with pagination.  Pass ``include_removed=true`` to include soft-deleted entries in the audit trail.

schema.title: Response List Denylist Admin Denylist Get

delete.summary: Remove a wallet from the denylist
delete.description: Soft-deletes the active denylist entry for ``wallet``.  The removal is recorded in the audit trail with ``removed_at`` timestamp. Returns 404 if the wallet has no active denylist entry.

schema.title: Response Remove From Denylist Admin Denylist  Wallet  Delete

post.summary: Create a new scoped API key
post.description: Generates a new API key.  The plaintext key is returned **once** in ``plaintext_key`` and is never stored.  All subsequent storage uses the BLAKE2b hash.  Valid scopes: ``read:scores``, ``write:suppressions``, ``admin``.

schema.title: Response Create Key Admin Api Keys Post

get.description: Returns all non-revoked API key records.  Key hashes are **not** included in the response.

schema.title: Response Get Keys Admin Api Keys Get

delete.description: Immediately revokes the key identified by ``key_id``.  Any subsequent request using the revoked key returns 401 with no caching delay.

schema.title: Response Delete Key Admin Api Keys  Key Id  Delete

post.description: Queue a batch scoring job for up to 1000 wallets.

get.description: Return the status and results of a batch scoring job.
Stream risk scores as CSV. Max 90-day window. Requires admin key.
Stream risk scores as Parquet (snappy compressed). Max 90-day window. Requires admin key.

Return current rate limiter and backpressure state.

Requires the ``X-LedgerLens-Admin-Key`` header.  Returns 503 if no
streamer is currently registered.
Return detected multi-hop path-payment wash-trade cycles.

schema.title: Response List Path Cycles Path Cycles Get

get.description:
Return every namespace with per-table record counts.

Admin-only (requires the ``LEDGERLENS_ADMIN_API_KEY`` header).
Gated by `require_admin_key` — the admin wildcard API key is
required to see cross-namespace data.

schema.title: Response Admin Namespaces Admin Namespaces Get

get.description:
Return a causal explanation of the risk score for ``wallet``.

Unlike SHAP, which conflates causal and correlational contributions, this
endpoint returns *causal* average treatment effects (ATEs) estimated via
do-calculus interventions on the fitted structural causal model.

Response fields
---------------
- ``feature_ate_table``: ATE of each feature on risk_score — the expected
  change in score if that feature alone is moved from 0 to 1.
- ``top_causal_features``: top-3 features by absolute ATE.
- ``counterfactual_score``: predicted score if ``feature_override`` were
  applied (only present when ``feature_override`` is supplied).
- ``coverage_note``: advisory note about sample size and estimate quality.

Security
--------
- ``feature_override`` is strictly validated: feature must be a known
  observable feature name; value must be a finite float in [-1000, 1000].
- Rate-limited to 10 requests per minute per IP.
- ``counterfactual_score`` is not cached publicly to prevent fingerprinting
  the model's sensitivity surface.

Errors
------
- **400** — invalid Stellar wallet address format.
- **404** — no scores found for the wallet.
- **422** — invalid ``feature_override`` format or value.
- **429** — rate limit exceeded (10 req/min per IP).
- **503** — causal model not available (insufficient training data, DoWhy
  not installed, or refutation gate triggered).

parameters.name: feature_override

schema.description: Optional feature override in 'feature=value' format. Returns counterfactual_score with the override applied. Example: 'wash_ring_membership=0.0'
schema.title: Feature Override

parameters.description: Optional feature override in 'feature=value' format. Returns counterfactual_score with the override applied. Example: 'wash_ring_membership=0.0'

get.description: Returns 200 when healthy, 503 when any hard-failure component check fails. Checks DB connectivity, model files, and circuit breaker states.
Return the most recent risk score for each (wallet, asset_pair) pair, filtered by minimum score, Benford/ML flags, and sorted by the chosen field. Supports pagination via ``limit`` and ``offset``.

parameters.name: benford_flag

schema.description: Filter by the Benford detector flag when provided.
schema.title: Benford Flag

parameters.description: Filter by the Benford detector flag when provided.

parameters.name: ml_flag

schema.description: Filter by the machine-learning detector flag when provided.
schema.title: Ml Flag

parameters.description: Filter by the machine-learning detector flag when provided.

parameters.name: sort_by

schema.description: Sort descending by score, confidence, or timestamp.
schema.title: Sort By

parameters.description: Sort descending by score, confidence, or timestamp.

schema.title: Response List Scores V1 Scores Get

get.summary: SHAP feature explanations for a wallet
get.description: Return the top-5 SHAP feature contributions for ``wallet`` on ``asset_pair``. Requires models to be loaded at startup. Returns a list of ``{feature, shap_value}`` objects ordered by absolute contribution.

parameters.name: asset_pair

schema.description: Asset pair to explain, e.g. XLM/USDC
schema.title: Asset Pair

parameters.description: Asset pair to explain, e.g. XLM/USDC

schema.title: Response Explain Wallet Score V1 Scores  Wallet  Explain Get

get.summary: Counterfactual feature changes to lower risk score
get.description: Return up to ``n`` minimal feature changes that would drop ``wallet``'s score below ``target_score``. Hard-capped at 5 seconds; returns empty list on timeout.

parameters.name: asset_pair

schema.description: Asset pair to generate counterfactuals for, e.g. XLM/USDC
schema.title: Asset Pair

parameters.description: Asset pair to generate counterfactuals for, e.g. XLM/USDC

schema.title: Response Wallet Counterfactual V1 Scores  Wallet  Counterfactual Get

get.description: Return the latest score for ``wallet`` on each asset pair. If the wallet has an active allowlist entry the score is overridden to 0; if it has an active denylist entry the score is overridden to 100. Cross-chain EVM links are included when bridge transfer records exist.

schema.title: Response Wallet Scores V1 Scores  Wallet  Get

get.description: Return the full bridge transfer history for ``wallet`` across all supported EVM chains.

schema.title: Response Wallet Cross Chain V1 Wallets  Wallet  Cross Chain Get

get.description: Without ``alert_type``, returns ``RiskScore`` records at or above the threshold. With ``alert_type``, returns stored typed alerts such as ``SANDWICH_ATTACK`` or ``WASH_TRADING``, most recent first.

parameters.name: alert_type

schema.description: Filter typed manipulation alerts (e.g. SANDWICH_ATTACK). When omitted, returns risk scores at or above the threshold.
schema.title: Alert Type

parameters.description: Filter typed manipulation alerts (e.g. SANDWICH_ATTACK). When omitted, returns risk scores at or above the threshold.

get.summary: Asset pairs ranked by average wallet risk
get.description: Return each asset pair ranked by its average wallet risk score (descending).

schema.title: Response Asset Risk Ranking V1 Assets Risk Ranking Get

get.description: Return detected wash-trading rings from the latest pipeline run.

schema.title: Response List Rings V1 Rings Get

get.description: Return the most recent set of correlated asset pairs from the pipeline, including Spearman correlation coefficient, method, and shared wallet burst windows.

schema.title: Response List Correlations V1 Correlations Get

get.description: Return pool-level round-trip ratio and trader concentration for ``pool_id``.

schema.title: Response Pool Risk V1 Amm Pools  Pool Id  Risk Get

get.description: Return detected atomic circular path-payment routes, paginated.

schema.title: Response Circular Path Payments V1 Path Payments Circular Get

post.summary: Submit ground-truth feedback for a scored wallet
post.description: Record ground-truth feedback for a previously scored wallet/asset_pair. Writes one ScoringFeedback row per model (3 total). Requires admin key.

schema.title: Response Submit Feedback V1 Feedback Post

get.description: Return the most recent PSI-based drift checks recorded by ``retrain-check``. Admin-key gated.

schema.title: Response Drift Reports V1 Admin Drift Reports Get

get.description: Return the latest RobustnessReport from the database. Admin-key gated.

schema.title: Response Robustness Report V1 Admin Robustness Report Get

get.description: Return live red team robustness metrics: ``evasion_rate_24h``, ``mean_generations_to_evade``, and ``hardening_delta``.

schema.title: Response Model Robustness V1 Model Robustness Get

get.description: Return the most recent per-model retrain outcomes, optionally filtered by model name. Admin-key gated.

schema.title: Response Retrain Runs V1 Admin Retrain Runs Get

get.description: Return the most recent federated-round audit records (participant IDs are SHA-256 hashed). Admin-key gated.

schema.title: Response Federated Audit Log V1 Admin Federated Audit Log Get

get.description: Return current ensemble classifier weights from the adaptive Thompson-sampling reweighter.
Return all active webhook subscribers. Secrets are masked.

schema.title: Response List Webhooks V1 Webhooks Get

post.description: Register a new webhook subscriber with optional wallet and asset pair filters. The secret is AES-256-GCM encrypted at rest.

schema.title: Response Create Webhook V1 Webhooks Post

delete.description: Deactivate a webhook subscriber by its ID.

schema.title: Response Delete Webhook V1 Webhooks  Subscriber Id  Delete

get.description: Return all webhook deliveries that have permanently failed after exhausting retries.

schema.title: Response Dead Letters V1 Webhooks Dead Letters Get

post.description: Submit a dispute for a wallet's risk score. Rate-limited to prevent abuse.

get.description: Return a dispute record with vote counts. Voter identities are hidden.

post.summary: Cast a committee vote on a dispute
post.description: Submit an approve or reject vote for a dispute. Admin-key gated.

get.description: Return all open on-chain governance proposals.

post.description: Create a new on-chain governance proposal. Admin-key gated.
Cast a vote on an open governance proposal. Admin-key gated.

latency_ms.title: Latency Ms
latency_ms.description: End-to-end latency in milliseconds from trade receipt to score update

score_lower.title: Score Lower
score_lower.description: Lower bound of 90 % conformal prediction interval

score_upper.title: Score Upper
score_upper.description: Upper bound of 90 % conformal prediction interval

prediction_set.title: Prediction Set
prediction_set.description: Class indices in the conformal prediction set

coverage_guarantee.title: Coverage Guarantee
coverage_guarantee.description: Target coverage level (1 - alpha) of the prediction set
